sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current state is N=5, Y=5. Let me try clicking on the r cross at (10, 52)
# I've tried it at other states but not at (5, 5)

print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")

# Check if level completed
if last_action_result.get('level_completed') or last_action_result.get('done'):
    print("LEVEL COMPLETED!")
else:
    # Check state
    seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    n_state = y_state = None
    for n in seg:
        if n['color'] == 'N':
            min_row = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
            if min_row < 15:
                n_state = n['pixels']
        if n['color'] == 'Y':
            min_row = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
            if min_row < 35:
                y_state = n['pixels']
    print(f"State: N={n_state}, Y={y_state}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
